data.name: NoTodoCommentsTitle
data.value: Do not leave TODO comments in finished code

data.name: NoTodoCommentsMessageFormat
data.value: TODO comment found. Remove or resolve all TODO comments before completing the implementation.

data.name: NoTodoCommentsDescription
data.value: TODO comments indicate unfinished work. All TODO comments must be resolved before a pull request is merged. Use work items or tasks to track remaining work instead.

data.name: NoGlobalVariablesTitle
data.value: Avoid global variables in AL objects

data.name: NoGlobalVariablesMessageFormat
data.value: Global variable '{0}' should be avoided. Pass variables as parameters or use local variables instead.

data.name: NoGlobalVariablesDescription
data.value: Global variables in AL objects create implicit coupling between procedures and make code harder to test and maintain. Prefer passing values as parameters or using local variables.

data.name: ValidateFieldAssignmentsTitle
data.value: Field assignments should use Validate

data.name: ValidateFieldAssignmentsMessageFormat
data.value: Direct assignment to field '{0}' bypasses validation triggers. Use Validate() to ensure business rules are enforced.

data.name: ValidateFieldAssignmentsDescription
data.value: Direct field assignments bypass the OnValidate trigger, which may contain important business logic. Use the Validate method to ensure all validation logic is executed when assigning field values.

data.name: NoTypeOrPrefixInVariableNameTitle
data.value: Avoid type names and Hungarian-style prefixes in variable names

data.name: NoTypeOrPrefixInVariableNameMessageFormat
data.value: Variable name '{0}' contains a type name or Hungarian-style prefix (lrec, grec). Use descriptive, intention-revealing names instead.

data.name: NoTypeOrPrefixInVariableNameDescription
data.value: Variable names should be descriptive and intention-revealing. Avoid prefixes like 'lrec', 'grec' and type names like 'Integer', 'Boolean', 'Text' embedded in variable names. This follows clean code naming conventions.

data.name: NoTodoCommentsCodeAction
data.value: ALCops: Remove TODO comment

data.name: ValidateFieldAssignmentsCodeAction
data.value: ALCops: Replace with Validate()

data.name: NoModifyInOnValidateCodeAction
data.value: ALCops: Remove Modify() call

data.name: DataClassificationOnTableCodeAction
data.value: ALCops: Remove redundant DataClassification from field

data.name: EventSubscriberNamingConventionCodeAction
data.value: ALCops: Rename to '{0}'

data.name: EventSubscriberNamingConventionTitle
data.value: Event subscriber procedures must end with the event name

data.name: EventSubscriberNamingConventionMessageFormat
data.value: Event subscriber procedure '{0}' does not end with the event name '{1}' (e.g., 'SetRefOrderTypeInitValue{1}').

data.name: EventSubscriberNamingConventionDescription
data.value: Event subscriber procedures must follow the FunctionName+EventName convention: the procedure name must end with the subscribed event name. For example, a subscriber to 'OnBeforeInsertEvent' should be named 'SetRefOrderTypeInitValueOnBeforeInsertEvent'.

data.name: UseSetLoadFieldsTitle
data.value: Use SetLoadFields for performance-critical record reads

data.name: UseSetLoadFieldsMessageFormat
data.value: Record read using '{0}' without a preceding SetLoadFields call. Use SetLoadFields to load only the required fields for better performance.

data.name: UseSetLoadFieldsDescription
data.value: When reading records using FindSet, FindFirst, FindLast, or Find, use SetLoadFields to specify only the fields needed. This reduces the amount of data transferred from the database and improves performance, especially for wide tables.

data.name: NoModifyInOnValidateTitle
data.value: Do not call Modify() inside an OnValidate trigger

data.name: NoModifyInOnValidateMessageFormat
data.value: Modify() called inside an OnValidate trigger. The calling code is responsible for persisting the record; calling Modify() here can cause unexpected double-saves or infinite loops.

data.name: NoModifyInOnValidateDescription
data.value: Calling Modify() inside an OnValidate trigger bypasses the expected save flow and can cause double-saves, infinite trigger loops, or data-integrity issues. The code that sets the field value is responsible for calling Modify() afterwards.

data.name: DataClassificationOnTableTitle
data.value: Set DataClassification as a table-level property, not per field

data.name: DataClassificationOnTableMessageFormat
data.value: DataClassification is already set at the table level and should not be repeated on individual fields. Remove the per-field DataClassification property.

data.name: DataClassificationOnTableDescription
data.value: When DataClassification is set as a table property it applies to all fields automatically. Repeating the same classification on individual fields is redundant. Set DataClassification once on the table and remove per-field declarations.

data.name: LabelCommentForPlaceholdersTitle
data.value: Labels with placeholders must have a Comment property

data.name: LabelCommentForPlaceholdersMessageFormat
data.value: Label contains placeholders (%1, %2, #1, etc.) but has no Comment property. Add a Comment describing what each placeholder represents (e.g., Comment = '%1 = Customer Name').

data.name: LabelCommentForPlaceholdersDescription
data.value: Labels that use placeholders (%1, %2, #1, #2, etc.) must declare a Comment property that explains what each placeholder will be replaced with. This is required for correct XLIFF translations and code readability.
